columns.extraction_plan: Extract the "Median Time (95% Cl; months)" from Table 2 for the "ADT Plus Docetaxel" arm. This represents the time to CRPC (castration-resistant prostate cancer), which is related to PSA progression. The value is 19.4 (16.8 to 22.6).

Extract the "Median Time (95% Cl; months)" from Table 2 for the "ADT Alone" arm. This represents the time to CRPC (castration-resistant prostate cancer), which is related to PSA progression. The value is 11.7 (10.8 to 14.4).
